title: hieracium juranum subsp. cichoriaceum
intro: Hieracium juranum subsp. cichoriaceum is a lesser-known species of hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium juranum subsp. cichoriaceum is often used as a tincture or infusion, and can also be applied topically as a salve or ointment to soothe skin irritations.
